hero.title: Empowering the Modern Farmer
hero.subtitle: Your one-stop shop for quality agricultural inputs, expert advice, and smart farming tools.

services.title: Farming & Livestock Services
services.subtitle: Access expert support to improve your yield and animal health.
services.scannerDescription: Instant disease analysis and treatment advice from a photo.
services.soilDescription: Request a kit and get lab analysis with fertilizer recommendations.
services.agronomistDescription: Book a virtual or field visit with a certified agronomist for expert advice.
services.veterinaryDescription: Book a consultation or farm visit for your livestock with a certified agrovet.
services.logisticsDescription: Book a truck to transport your farm inputs or harvest to the market.
services.warehouseDescription: Find and book secure, affordable storage facilities for your harvest.
services.financeDescription: Access loans, insurance, and other financial products tailored for farmers.
services.toolRentalDescription: Book heavy-duty equipment like tractors and plowers on a daily basis.

productGrid.loadingSub: Finding the best products for your query.
productGrid.noProductsSub: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria. The AI may not have found a match.

login.signInTo: Sign in to Mkulima Super App
login.demoInfo: Use any email from the list below with its corresponding role.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your email and password.

userProfile.verificationSub: Complete verification to access financial services.

kycModal.title: Identity Verification (KYC)
kycModal.description: To access financial services, we need to verify your identity. Please provide your National ID (NIDA) details.
kycModal.selfieDescription: Make sure your face and ID are clear.
kycModal.error: Please fill in all fields and upload both images.
kycModal.successDescription: Your documents are now under review. This may take up to 48 hours. We will notify you once the process is complete.

assistant.welcome: Expert AI Assistant is ready. How can I help you today?
